packagingTargets.name: source-tree-default
packagingTargets.notes: Builds and tests the engine and sample games from the source tree.

packagingTargets.name: desktop-gui
packagingTargets.notes: Builds the optional SDL3, Dear ImGui, editor, and SDL3 audio adapter lane.

packagingTargets.name: desktop-game-runtime
packagingTargets.notes: Builds the optional editor-independent desktop game runtime samples through the desktop-runtime preset with Windows-native host evidence first, plus Win32 platform and WASAPI tests, runtime host tests including DiagnosticsRecorder-backed frame profiles and renderer counter capture, MK_runtime_host_win32 public/API tests, finite sample_desktop_runtime_shell --smoke, DXC-available build-output DXIL artifact smoke paths, DXC SPIR-V CodeGen-available build-output SPIR-V artifact smoke paths, the non-shell sample_desktop_runtime_game --smoke path, the Win32 config-only sample_generated_desktop_runtime_package scaffold proof generated by tools/new-game.ps1 -Template DesktopRuntimePackage, the Win32 sample_generated_desktop_runtime_cooked_scene_package scaffold proof generated by tools/new-game.ps1 -Template DesktopRuntimeCookedScenePackage with --require-scene-package and native NullRenderer fallback, and the DXC-available sample_generated_desktop_runtime_material_shader_package_shader_artifacts_smoke source-tree proof generated by tools/new-game.ps1 -Template DesktopRuntimeMaterialShaderPackage with modern material package counters emitted by the generated main.cpp. Migrated config-only and cooked-scene scaffold games use Win32DesktopGameHost and HOST_BACKEND win32. Remaining material/2D/3D/non-shell samples still use SdlDesktopGameHost and SdlDesktopPresentation for host-owned renderer selection with D3D12/Vulkan-ready surface probing, optional build-output D3D12 DXIL or Vulkan SPIR-V shader bytecode RhiFrameRenderer creation, host-owned packaged D3D12/Vulkan scene GPU binding, host-owned Frame Graph/Postprocess v0 setup including optional depth-input fallback/report diagnostics, host-owned package-visible fixed sampled-depth 3x3 PCF directional shadow filtering setup with first-party fallback/report diagnostics, package-visible Renderer General Quality Matrix v1 fields with renderer_quality_matrix_status=host_evidence_required, renderer_quality_matrix_dependency_gated_rows=0, renderer_quality_matrix_unsupported_rows=0, and renderer_quality_matrix_general_renderer_quality_ready=0 plus renderer quality summary fields such as renderer_quality_status, renderer_quality_matrix_status, renderer_quality_matrix_ready_rows, renderer_quality_matrix_host_gated_rows, renderer_quality_matrix_dependency_gated_rows, renderer_quality_matrix_unsupported_rows, renderer_quality_matrix_d3d12_ready, renderer_quality_matrix_vulkan_strict_ready, renderer_quality_matrix_general_renderer_quality_ready, renderer_quality_expected_framegraph_render_passes, renderer_quality_expected_framegraph_barrier_steps, renderer_quality_framegraph_render_passes_ok, renderer_quality_framegraph_barrier_steps_ok, and renderer_quality_framegraph_execution_budget_ok, package-visible modern material counters such as modern_material_variants, modern_material_ready, modern_material_diagnostics, modern_material_texture_dependencies, modern_material_shader_evidence_ready, modern_material_d3d12_shader_evidence_ready, modern_material_vulkan_shader_evidence_ready, and modern_material_selected_shader_evidence_ready, backend-neutral presentation report fields including framegraph_passes_executed, framegraph_render_passes_recorded, and framegraph_barrier_steps_executed, and NullRenderer fallback diagnostics; DesktopGameRunner can drive swapchain-backed RhiFrameRenderer resize and optional observability capture through public IWindow/IRenderer/MK_core contracts.

packagingTargets.name: desktop-runtime-release
packagingTargets.notes: Builds the desktop-runtime-release preset, cleans the desktop runtime install prefix, installs a selected registered desktop runtime game executable plus selected package files derived from target metadata, selected D3D12 DXIL and explicitly requested Vulkan SPIR-V shader artifacts when declared, rejects SDL3.dll in installed and archived Windows runtime artifacts, writes share/Mirakanai/desktop-runtime-games.json package metadata with selectedPackageTarget, gameManifest paths, packageFiles, d3d12ShaderArtifacts, and vulkanShaderArtifacts, validates the installed SDK consumer, runs the installed selected game smoke from metadata, verifies the selected installed game manifest, package files, required shader artifacts, and presentation/postprocess/directional-shadow/renderer-quality and renderer_quality_matrix_* status fields, and creates a CPack ZIP without requiring Dear ImGui or MK_editor. pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/package-desktop-runtime.ps1 defaults to sample_desktop_runtime_shell with metadata-driven --smoke --require-d3d12-shaders --require-vulkan-shaders; tools/package-desktop-runtime.ps1 -GameTarget sample_generated_desktop_runtime_package validates the generated Win32 config-only package scaffold with metadata-driven --smoke --require-config runtime/sample_generated_desktop_runtime_package.config and no shader/cooked-scene claims; tools/package-desktop-runtime.ps1 -GameTarget sample_generated_desktop_runtime_cooked_scene_package validates the generated Win32 cooked-scene package scaffold with metadata-driven --smoke --require-config runtime/sample_generated_desktop_runtime_cooked_scene_package.config --require-scene-package runtime/sample_generated_desktop_runtime_cooked_scene_package.geindex, runtime package loading, renderer-neutral scene submission counters, and native NullRenderer fallback without shader or scene GPU binding claims; tools/package-desktop-runtime.ps1 -GameTarget sample_desktop_runtime_game validates the non-shell packaged scene proof with metadata-driven --smoke --require-config runtime/sample_desktop_runtime_game.config --require-scene-package runtime/sample_desktop_runtime_game.geindex --require-d3d12-scene-shaders --video-driver windows --require-d3d12-renderer --require-scene-gpu-bindings --require-postprocess --require-postprocess-depth-input --require-directional-shadow --require-directional-shadow-filtering --require-d3d12-shadow-cascade-policy --require-lighting-shadow-policy --require-scene-scale-policy --require-d3d12-instanced-draw-evidence --require-renderer-quality-gates --require-framegraph-multiqueue-evidence --require-native-ui-overlay --require-native-ui-textured-sprite-atlas --require-gpu-skinning --require-quaternion-animation, including cooked scene package load, renderer-submit counters, target-specific scene/postprocess/shadow DXIL artifacts, host-owned D3D12 scene GPU binding counters, Frame Graph/Postprocess v0 status with postprocess_depth_input_ready=1, Directional Shadow Filtering v0 status with directional_shadow_status=ready, directional_shadow_ready=1, directional_shadow_filter_mode=fixed_pcf_3x3, directional_shadow_filter_taps=9, directional_shadow_filter_radius_texels=1, framegraph_passes=3, framegraph_passes_executed=6, framegraph_render_passes_recorded=6, and framegraph_barrier_steps_executed=15, Scene Scale Policy v1 selected D3D12 package fields with scene_scale_policy_backend_instancing_evidence_required=1 and scene_scale_policy_backend_instancing_evidence_ready=1, selected D3D12 instanced draw execution fields with d3d12_instanced_draw_execution_status=ready, d3d12_instanced_draw_execution_ready=1, d3d12_instanced_draw_execution_selected=1, d3d12_instanced_draw_execution_expected_instances=6, positive d3d12_instanced_draw_calls, positive d3d12_instanced_indexed_draw_calls, positive d3d12_instanced_instances_submitted, positive rhi_instanced_draw_calls, positive rhi_instanced_indexed_draw_calls, positive rhi_instanced_instances_submitted, d3d12_instanced_draws_ok=1, d3d12_instanced_instances_ok=1, and Renderer Package Quality Gates v1 status with renderer_quality_status=ready, renderer_quality_ready=1, renderer_quality_diagnostics=0, renderer_quality_expected_framegraph_passes=3, renderer_quality_expected_framegraph_render_passes=6, renderer_quality_expected_framegraph_barrier_steps=15, renderer_quality_framegraph_render_passes_ok=1, renderer_quality_framegraph_barrier_steps_ok=1, and renderer_quality_framegraph_execution_budget_ok=1. The same selected target can validate target-specific scene/postprocess/shadow SPIR-V artifacts plus the sample-owned Vulkan mapping compute SPIR-V proof artifact and host-owned Vulkan scene GPU binding plus depth-aware postprocess/directional shadow filtering with postprocess_depth_input_ready=1, directional_shadow_ready=1, directional_shadow_filter_mode=fixed_pcf_3x3, directional_shadow_filter_taps=9, directional_shadow_filter_radius_texels=1, framegraph_passes_executed=6, framegraph_render_passes_recorded=6, framegraph_barrier_steps_executed=15, renderer_quality_status=ready, renderer_quality_expected_framegraph_render_passes=6, renderer_quality_framegraph_render_passes_ok=1, renderer_quality_framegraph_barrier_steps_ok=1, renderer_quality_framegraph_execution_budget_ok=1, and -RequireVulkanShaders plus explicit Vulkan smoke args on a ready Windows/Vulkan host.

packagingTargets.name: asset-importers
packagingTargets.notes: Builds MK_tools with optional libspng, fastgltf, and miniaudio importer adapters and runs importer-capable tests.

packagingTargets.name: windows-cpack-zip
packagingTargets.notes: Builds Release, runs Release tests, installs the SDK layout, validates examples/installed_consumer against the installed mirakana:: package, and creates a CPack ZIP with package metadata.

packagingTargets.name: android-gameactivity
packagingTargets.notes: Android Gradle Plugin 9.1.0, Gradle 9.3.1, JDK 17, Android SDK Platform 36.1, Build Tools 36.0.0, Android SDK CMake 4.1.2, NDK CMake, Prefab, AndroidX AppCompat 1.7.1, AndroidX Core 1.18.0, GameActivity 3.0.4, NDK Vulkan loader linkage, private ANativeWindow/VK_KHR_android_surface creation bridge, private low-latency AAudio float32 output adapter, generated asset packaging, host-validated Debug/Release APK output, Release signing verification with non-repository upload keys, upload certificate export, deterministic ANDROID_AVD_HOME normalization, AVD readiness diagnostics, and emulator install/launch smoke coverage exist; generated game manifests are validated and packaged before package build attempts, and pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/check-mobile-packaging.ps1 reports signing/toolchain/AVD/device blockers explicitly with stable kind slugs.

packagingTargets.name: ios-metal
packagingTargets.notes: Apple CMake/Xcode iOS bundle template exists with UIKit/Metal framework linkage, Metal-backed root view setup, sandbox save/cache/shared storage root mapping, game manifest resource packaging, bundle identifier inputs, simulator/device SDK selection, simulator signing suppression, Xcode signing inputs, iOS Simulator install/launch smoke scripting through pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/smoke-ios-package.ps1, and explicit full-Xcode/iOS-SDK/iOS-runtime blockers with stable kind slugs from pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/check-mobile-packaging.ps1; actual host-validated simulator/device results and backend-neutral Metal presentation remain Apple-host gated.
